modified_paragraphs.after: We’re developing generative AI experiences and are excited to bring them to more people and businesses across Meta Products worldwide. That’s why we’re developing AI at Meta, our collection of generative AI features and experiences, like Meta AI and AI Creative Tools, along with the models that power them. This also includes making models available through an open platform to support researchers, developers and others in the AI community.
modified_paragraphs.before: We’re developing generative AI experiences and are excited to bring them to more people and businesses across Meta Products worldwide. That’s why we’re developing AI at Meta, our collection of generative AI features and experiences, like Meta AI and AI Creative Tools, along with the models that power them. We’re also making models available through an open platform to support researchers, developers and others in the community.
